title: Layered Stuff
description: Adds more details to some blocks using layers.
body:
Layered Stuff

This pack changes models to have an extra layer over/into some blocks that follow their textures. It is similar to 3D blocks resource packs except this adds flat cubes instead of ugly micro-voxels. ### Features - **Layered Anvils** - **Layered Barrel** - **Layered Bookshelf & Chiseled Bookshelves** - **Layered Crafter** - **Layered Dispenser & Dropper** - **Layered End Portal** - **Layered Jukebox** - **Layered Shelf** - **Layered Furnaces** - **Layered Pumpkins and Carved Pumpkins** - **Layered Lanterns** - **Layered Leaves** - **Layered Ladders** - **Layered Rails** - **Layered Respawn Anchor** - **Layered Bricks** ### Other features - **Backfaced Doors** - **Backfaced Trapdoors** - **Square Grass** ❗Requires [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) ❗❗This pack doesn't add any textures, meaning it can work with other resource packs. If a model isn't showing properly, check if it's enabled in the resource pack options or make sure this resource pack is above everything else. ---
